query:
SELECT s.id, s.userId, s.commissionRate, s.orderCount, s.totalSales, s.notes, s.isActive 
FROM salespersons s 
JOIN users u ON s.userId = u.id 
WHERE u.name = '测试销售' LIMIT 1;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user SQg17LQaPsV51m8.32b9e2c038f9 --database jtCSa4Dgw9WMNzinVreVWF --execute SELECT s.id, s.userId, s.commissionRate, s.orderCount, s.totalSales, s.notes, s.isActive 
FROM salespersons s 
JOIN users u ON s.userId = u.id 
WHERE u.name = '测试销售' LIMIT 1;
